ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Datetime stamp for the data point */,
  "mkt_rf" REAL /* Market risk factor (Mkt-RF) */,
  "smb" REAL /* Size premium (SMB) */,
  "hml" REAL /* Value premium (HML) */,
  "rf" REAL /* Risk-free rate (RF) */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of trades for the given datetime */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock for the given datetime */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock for the given datetime */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock for the given datetime */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock for the given datetime */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "is_validated" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the data has been validated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Professional title (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position within the organization (e.g., Senior Researcher, Junior Analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the researcher joined the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the analyst belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Professional title (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position within the organization (e.g., Senior Researcher, Junior Analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the analyst joined the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the administrator belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Professional title (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position within the organization (e.g., Senior Researcher, Junior Analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the administrator joined the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("administrator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader (foreign key to researchers) */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., academic, commercial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project (e.g., lead, contributor, advisor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data requested */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who approved the request (foreign key to administrators) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the request was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES administrators ("administrator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
